message:
fix(protocol): correct InvalidUtf8 test to expect InvalidInteger for integers

The test fr_p2c_002_u011_invalid_utf8_consistency was incorrectly
expecting InvalidUtf8 for ":0xFF\r\n" (integer frame with invalid byte).
The parser correctly returns InvalidInteger since 0xFF is not a valid
digit, not InvalidUtf8.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
